parsed_output.visible_action: Juno takes the final step onto the marked safe-line marker with both hands open and visible, then stops without turning her back on the atrium.
parsed_output.spoken_text: I am on the line. Nobody improve this moment. It is load-bearing and stupid enough already.
parsed_output.private_interpretation: The feed is behaving like evidence instead of appetite for once, which is almost more frightening because I can feel how much machinery wants a cleaner ending. Sol is not moving. Security is still waiting. The next danger is someone deciding resolution needs theater.
parsed_output.intended_effect: Confirm the crossing in plain visible terms, discourage hero framing or security escalation, and keep the feed locked to observable facts until safe-line confirmation completes.
state_update_candidates: Juno visibly reaches the marked safe line with hands visible.
Safe-line confirmation can now proceed if no interruption occurs.
Security hold remains active with no new visible threat gesture.
Evidence export remains locked and preserved through the crossing.

relationship_update_candidates.value: Juno tacitly cooperates with the evidence-focused framing while warning against dramatization.
Juno continues treating Sol only by visible behavior: empty-handed, not approaching, not trusted beyond that.
Juno maintains nonthreatening posture to reduce pretext for intervention.

unresolved_hooks: Whether safe-line confirmation is granted without additional delay.
Whether Lucent attempts to repackage the crossing after evidence export unlocks.

Whether security stand-down follows confirmation or remains staged around the atrium.
